transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
For today's mukbang,
I have pizza
I ate a 1kg pizza last time
They came out with the pepperoni one
And I wanted to try it
They put 1kg of cheese in this pizza alone
This right here is the spicy chicken feet
Cheese spaghetti
We have chicken wings here
Cheese ring
Wait, not cheese ring It's shrimp rings
Let's start eating before they get cold
Bon appetit
Pizza=Coca Cola
Give us the cheese pull

I turned on the stream as soon as I could
It tastes just like the other 1kg pizza Except there's some saltiness from the pepperonis
So good
Yum
Shrimp ring
Garlic dipping sauce
I'm going to heat it up really quick
The cheese was a little hard, so I put it in the oven Tell me when it's been 5 minutes, please
Let's eat the other dishes while we wait
Chicken feet
Looks good
The smoky flavor
It's spicy
I ordered it just in case the pizza was too cheesy
I ordered this on the side
Cheese spaghetti

The cheese is still melted on this one
So good
Let's dip it in the garlic sauce
Come on, time
I want to hurry and eat the pizza
Will it be ready by now? I put it at 180 degrees
Chicken feet
The smoky flavor is nice, but it's so spicy
A can of beer would be nice
The pull isn't that great
It's spicy
But delicious
It's like a chip now
It's my first time trying this from this place
It's good
The pizza tastes like a tasty pepperoni pizza

It's a bit salty
It's good but too spicy
Shrimp ring
The shrimp is like..
It's not all shrimp meat
It's here and there
I don't have that much food today
I ate a lot earlier today
I already finished half of the pizza
It's a small slice
Let's put the chicken feet on top The pizza is still warm
Put the chicken feet on top
I did a jokbal (pig feet) mukbang not too long ago
I heard something weird during the stream
I thought it was just me, but it was captured in the video
What was that just now?

Did you guys hear that sound?
It was a girl's voice
It's not me
My door was open
Well I thought it was open, but I found it closed later
This one tastes the best when it's warm
Chicken feet
I only have 2 slices left?
I went to eat with the editor not too long ago
I ordered the cold noodles and brought it to the table
I was going to eat it, but it was eaten
I said, "I didn't eat it, where did it go?"
Turns out I DID eat the noodles
It was a bite-size
This mukbang is going to be so short
This is only about 1 serving's worth

It's a small slice again
Let's dip it in the garlic sauce It's tasty
Personally,
Papa John's garlic dipping sauce is the best
That is so tasty
It's the best
Pizza
No, this one first
This much food doesn't fill me up at all
Shrimp ring?
Boneless chicken feet stick together over time
Let's grab a bunch
Thanks everyone~
